issue_description: Files won't sync to SharePoint document library
root_cause: The file being uploaded exceeded the character limit for file path length when combined with the deep folder structure of the SharePoint library.
resolution: Identified the file path length issue, restructured the folder hierarchy to shorten the overall path, renamed the file to a shorter name, and confirmed successful upload.

issue_description: User added to security group but still cannot access the resource
root_cause: The user's Kerberos ticket had not refreshed since the group membership change, so the new permissions were not reflected in their active session.
resolution: Confirmed the group membership change was correctly applied in Active Directory, had the user log off and back on to refresh their Kerberos ticket, and verified access to the resource was now working.

issue_description: Software behaves incorrectly since the last automatic update
root_cause: The latest software update introduced a compatibility issue with the company's customized configuration settings.
resolution: Identified the specific update causing the issue through vendor release notes, rolled back to the previous stable version while the vendor addressed the bug, and scheduled a controlled update once a patched version was released.

issue_description: Outlook inbox out of date compared to mobile app
root_cause: The local OST cache file had become corrupted, preventing synchronization between the Outlook client and the Exchange Online mailbox.
resolution: Closed Outlook, deleted the corrupted OST file from the local profile cache, reopened Outlook to trigger a fresh download of mailbox data, and confirmed new emails were syncing correctly.

issue_description: Pages printing with lines through the text
root_cause: The toner cartridge was low and the print drum required cleaning, resulting in degraded print quality.
resolution: Replaced the low toner cartridge, cleaned the print drum and rollers per manufacturer guidance, ran a test print and calibration cycle, and confirmed print quality was restored.

issue_description: User can log into the finance system but cannot view certain reports
root_cause: The user was assigned to an incorrect role profile within the application that did not include the necessary report-viewing permissions.
resolution: Reviewed the user's role assignment against their job requirements, updated the role profile to the correct permission set matching their department, and confirmed the user could access all required reports.

issue_description: BSOD occurring randomly during regular use
root_cause: A faulty RAM module was causing memory corruption errors leading to repeated blue screen crashes.
resolution: Ran the Windows Memory Diagnostic tool which confirmed RAM errors, replaced the faulty memory module, ran extended diagnostics to confirm stability, and monitored the device for 24 hours with no further crashes.

issue_description: External user search returns no results in Teams
root_cause: External access (federation) had not been enabled between the two organizations' tenants, preventing cross-tenant search and communication.
resolution: Verified external access settings in the Teams admin center, added the partner organization's domain to the allowed list, waited for the configuration to propagate, and confirmed successful contact search and messaging.

issue_description: Software install hangs at a specific step and does not complete
root_cause: Insufficient permissions on the local machine and a conflicting older version of the software were preventing successful installation.
resolution: Uninstalled the conflicting older version completely using the manufacturer's removal tool, ran the installer with elevated administrator privileges, and confirmed successful installation and application launch.

issue_description: Laptop unable to connect to the corporate WiFi network
root_cause: The wireless network profile on the device had a mismatched or expired certificate required for WPA2-Enterprise authentication.
resolution: Removed the existing WiFi profile from the device, reinstalled the required network authentication certificate, reconnected to the corporate SSID with updated credentials, and confirmed stable connectivity.

issue_description: Audio and video not working when joining a Teams call
root_cause: An outdated Teams client version was incompatible with the meeting service's updated calling infrastructure.
resolution: Updated the Teams client to the latest version through the app's update mechanism, restarted the application, verified microphone and camera permissions were granted, and confirmed successful meeting join with working audio and video.

issue_description: Specific application freezes constantly on desktop workstation
root_cause: Insufficient system memory combined with a memory leak in an outdated version of the application was causing it to become unresponsive.
resolution: Closed unnecessary background processes to free memory, updated the application to the latest patched version, increased the page file size, and confirmed stable operation over an extended testing period.

issue_description: External recipients report our emails go straight to junk
root_cause: The domain's SPF and DKIM records were misconfigured, causing recipient mail servers to flag outgoing messages as potential spam.
resolution: Reviewed and corrected the SPF record to include all authorized sending IPs, verified DKIM signing was properly configured, and confirmed improved deliverability using a mail tester tool.

issue_description: Office 365 installation fails on newly issued laptop
root_cause: A corrupted previous installation of Office on the device was conflicting with the new installation attempt.
resolution: Ran the Microsoft Support and Recovery Assistant to fully remove remnants of the previous Office installation, downloaded a fresh installer from the Microsoft 365 portal, and confirmed successful installation and activation.

issue_description: Automated backup process reporting errors in the log
root_cause: Insufficient disk space on the backup storage volume caused the scheduled backup job to fail partway through.
resolution: Cleared outdated backup files according to retention policy to free up disk space, expanded the backup storage volume, manually triggered a full backup to confirm success, and verified the backup job schedule resumed normally.

issue_description: User locked out after too many incorrect password guesses
root_cause: The user had forgotten their password after an extended period away from the office and their self-service reset portal enrollment had expired.
resolution: Verified the user's identity per security policy, performed a manual password reset in Active Directory, set the account to require a password change at next logon, and guided the user through re-enrollment in self-service password reset.

issue_description: Search function broken in Outlook desktop client
root_cause: The Windows Search index for Outlook had become corrupted, preventing the search function from returning accurate results.
resolution: Rebuilt the Outlook search index via Indexing Options in Control Panel, verified Outlook was included in the indexed locations, allowed the index to rebuild fully, and confirmed search returned correct results.

issue_description: Application timing out for users connecting from new office location
root_cause: A firewall rule was not updated to include the new branch office subnet, blocking traffic to the internal application server.
resolution: Identified the missing firewall rule, added the branch office subnet to the allow list on the perimeter firewall, and confirmed successful access from the affected location.

issue_description: BSOD occurring randomly during regular use
root_cause: A faulty RAM module was causing memory corruption errors leading to repeated blue screen crashes.
resolution: Ran the Windows Memory Diagnostic tool which confirmed RAM errors, replaced the faulty memory module, ran extended diagnostics to confirm stability, and monitored the device for 24 hours with no further crashes.

issue_description: Outlook will not stay open, crashes within seconds
root_cause: A corrupted Outlook profile and a damaged add-in were causing the application to crash during initialization.
resolution: Started Outlook in safe mode to confirm an add-in conflict, disabled the problematic COM add-in, rebuilt the Outlook profile from Control Panel, and verified Outlook opened and synced normally.

issue_description: Security alert triggered for sign-in from unusual location
root_cause: The user had traveled internationally and signed in from a new location without prior notice, triggering the conditional access risk policy.
resolution: Contacted the user to verify the login was legitimate, confirmed travel details, cleared the risk flag in Azure AD Identity Protection, and reminded the user to enable travel notifications for future trips.

issue_description: User cannot approve MFA prompts on their new device
root_cause: The user's MFA authentication method was tied to a mobile device that was no longer in their possession, blocking the second authentication factor.
resolution: Verified the user's identity through alternate means per security policy, removed the old MFA device registration in Azure AD, guided the user through re-registering MFA on their new device, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: Office applications showing 'unlicensed product' error
root_cause: A token refresh failure between the local Office installation and the Azure AD authentication service caused the activation status to lapse.
resolution: Signed the user out of all Office applications, cleared cached credentials using Credential Manager, signed back in with corporate credentials, and confirmed Office reactivated successfully.

issue_description: Installation of approved software package fails with error code
root_cause: Insufficient permissions on the local machine and a conflicting older version of the software were preventing successful installation.
resolution: Uninstalled the conflicting older version completely using the manufacturer's removal tool, ran the installer with elevated administrator privileges, and confirmed successful installation and application launch.

issue_description: Outlook will not stay open, crashes within seconds
root_cause: A corrupted Outlook profile and a damaged add-in were causing the application to crash during initialization.
resolution: Started Outlook in safe mode to confirm an add-in conflict, disabled the problematic COM add-in, rebuilt the Outlook profile from Control Panel, and verified Outlook opened and synced normally.

issue_description: User experiences random disconnects from the corporate LAN
root_cause: A faulty network patch cable combined with a misconfigured switch port duplex setting caused intermittent packet loss and disconnects.
resolution: Replaced the faulty patch cable, reset the switch port to auto-negotiate duplex and speed settings, and monitored the connection for 30 minutes to confirm stability.

issue_description: Device not provisioned correctly for wireless network access
root_cause: The new device's MAC address had not yet been registered in the network access control system, which uses MAC-based filtering for some restricted SSIDs.
resolution: Registered the device's MAC address in the network access control system, applied the appropriate device profile, and confirmed successful connection to the corporate wireless network.

issue_description: USB storage device disabled by company policy
root_cause: USB storage device access was intentionally restricted by endpoint security policy to prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.
resolution: Confirmed the restriction was policy-driven and intentional, discussed the user's business need, and submitted an exception request for the specific device to be whitelisted by the security team once approved.

issue_description: Other participants cannot see shared screen in Teams call
root_cause: Outdated graphics drivers were incompatible with the screen sharing module used by the Teams client.
resolution: Updated the graphics card driver to the latest version, restarted the Teams application, tested screen sharing functionality in a test call, and confirmed the issue was resolved.

issue_description: Internal portal not resolving, only works with IP address
root_cause: The primary internal DNS server service had stopped responding due to a memory leak, causing name resolution failures for clients pointed to it.
resolution: Restarted the DNS server service, cleared the DNS cache on affected client machines using ipconfig /flushdns, verified zone records were intact, and confirmed name resolution was working normally.

issue_description: Messages to clients outside the company are not going through
root_cause: An outbound transport rule misconfiguration was blocking emails sent to specific external domains.
resolution: Reviewed mail flow logs in the Exchange admin center, identified the incorrect transport rule, corrected the recipient domain conditions, and confirmed successful delivery of a test email to an external address.

issue_description: Mouse and keyboard unresponsive, desktop otherwise running
root_cause: A Windows update had reset USB controller power management settings, causing USB ports to enter a low-power state that disconnected peripherals.
resolution: Updated USB controller drivers, disabled USB selective suspend in power management settings, reconnected peripherals to different USB ports, and confirmed consistent responsiveness.

issue_description: Employee needs MFA device reset after switching phones
root_cause: The user's MFA authentication method was tied to a mobile device that was no longer in their possession, blocking the second authentication factor.
resolution: Verified the user's identity through alternate means per security policy, removed the old MFA device registration in Azure AD, guided the user through re-registering MFA on their new device, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: Multi-factor authentication prompt missing during VPN login
root_cause: User's mobile device was not properly enrolled in the Duo MFA service after a recent phone replacement, preventing push notifications from being delivered.
resolution: Verified the user's identity, re-enrolled the new mobile device in the Duo MFA portal, sent a test push notification to confirm delivery, and validated successful VPN login with MFA.

issue_description: Cannot see team shared mailbox in Outlook anymore
root_cause: The user's permission on the shared mailbox had been inadvertently removed during a recent Active Directory group cleanup.
resolution: Re-added the user's permissions to the shared mailbox in the Exchange Online admin center, had the user remove and re-add the shared mailbox in Outlook, and confirmed it appeared with full access.

issue_description: Mailbox storage limit reached, new mail bouncing
root_cause: The user's mailbox had exceeded its assigned storage quota due to large attachments accumulated over time without archiving.
resolution: Archived older emails with large attachments to a local PST file, emptied the deleted items and junk folders, requested a temporary quota increase in Exchange Online, and confirmed mail flow resumed normally.

issue_description: External email delivery failing with NDR error
root_cause: An outbound transport rule misconfiguration was blocking emails sent to specific external domains.
resolution: Reviewed mail flow logs in the Exchange admin center, identified the incorrect transport rule, corrected the recipient domain conditions, and confirmed successful delivery of a test email to an external address.

issue_description: Request to install specialized design software for marketing team
root_cause: Standard software request requiring procurement validation, license assignment, and installation per the approved software catalog.
resolution: Verified the software request against the approved catalog and manager approval, assigned an available license, deployed the software via the software distribution tool, and confirmed successful installation and functionality.

issue_description: Print jobs stuck in queue and not printing
root_cause: The print spooler service had become unresponsive due to a corrupted print job stuck in the queue.
resolution: Stopped the print spooler service, deleted stuck print jobs from the spool folder, restarted the print spooler service, and confirmed a test print completed successfully.

issue_description: Printer stopped working after a recent Windows update
root_cause: The recent Windows update overwrote the existing printer driver with an incompatible generic driver.
resolution: Uninstalled the incompatible generic driver, downloaded and installed the manufacturer-certified driver version, reconfigured the default printer settings, and verified successful printing.

issue_description: SharePoint site shows error when navigating to specific library
root_cause: The user's permission group had been removed from the SharePoint site during a recent permissions audit.
resolution: Reviewed site permissions in SharePoint admin settings, re-added the user to the appropriate SharePoint group, verified inherited permissions on relevant document libraries, and confirmed the user could access the site.

issue_description: Unable to find old emails using Outlook search bar
root_cause: The Windows Search index for Outlook had become corrupted, preventing the search function from returning accurate results.
resolution: Rebuilt the Outlook search index via Indexing Options in Control Panel, verified Outlook was included in the indexed locations, allowed the index to rebuild fully, and confirmed search returned correct results.

issue_description: Computer shutting down due to apparent overheating
root_cause: Dust buildup in the CPU heatsink and case fans was restricting airflow, causing the system to overheat and trigger automatic shutdown protection.
resolution: Opened the desktop case, cleaned out accumulated dust from the heatsink and fans using compressed air, reapplied thermal paste to the CPU, and monitored temperatures under load to confirm the issue was resolved.

issue_description: Scanned documents not arriving via email from copier
root_cause: The SMTP relay credentials stored on the multifunction printer had expired after a scheduled password rotation.
resolution: Updated the SMTP authentication credentials in the printer's web configuration panel, tested the scan-to-email function with a sample document, and confirmed successful delivery.

issue_description: VPN software terminates right after startup
root_cause: Corrupted VPN client installation files combined with an outdated network adapter driver caused the application to crash on launch.
resolution: Uninstalled the VPN client completely, removed leftover configuration folders, updated the network adapter driver to the latest version, reinstalled the VPN client from the approved software repository, and confirmed stable connection without crashes.

issue_description: User unable to install Office due to missing license
root_cause: The new user's Office 365 license assignment was missed during the onboarding provisioning process.
resolution: Assigned the appropriate Office 365 license in the Microsoft 365 admin center, waited for license propagation, and confirmed the user could install and activate Office applications.

issue_description: User receiving 'mailbox full' errors and cannot send new email
root_cause: The user's mailbox had exceeded its assigned storage quota due to large attachments accumulated over time without archiving.
resolution: Archived older emails with large attachments to a local PST file, emptied the deleted items and junk folders, requested a temporary quota increase in Exchange Online, and confirmed mail flow resumed normally.

issue_description: Security log shows repeated unauthorized access attempts
root_cause: An external actor was attempting credential stuffing attacks against a privileged account using a list of leaked passwords.
resolution: Locked the targeted account immediately, forced a password reset with enhanced complexity requirements, enabled mandatory MFA for the account, and blocked the source IP addresses at the firewall.

issue_description: User cannot find corporate VPN profile after IT reimaged the device
root_cause: The VPN configuration profile was not included in the standard imaging process, so the freshly imaged device had no preconfigured connection.
resolution: Pushed the corporate VPN configuration profile via the software deployment tool, manually verified profile settings including gateway address and authentication method, and tested a successful connection.

issue_description: Software install hangs at a specific step and does not complete
root_cause: Insufficient permissions on the local machine and a conflicting older version of the software were preventing successful installation.
resolution: Uninstalled the conflicting older version completely using the manufacturer's removal tool, ran the installer with elevated administrator privileges, and confirmed successful installation and application launch.

issue_description: Teams chat notifications not appearing on desktop
root_cause: Windows Focus Assist settings combined with disabled notification permissions for Teams in Windows Settings were suppressing notification banners.
resolution: Checked Windows notification settings and enabled notifications for Microsoft Teams, disabled Focus Assist during work hours, verified notification settings within the Teams app itself, and confirmed alerts were now appearing.

issue_description: Installer exits with an error before finishing setup
root_cause: Insufficient permissions on the local machine and a conflicting older version of the software were preventing successful installation.
resolution: Uninstalled the conflicting older version completely using the manufacturer's removal tool, ran the installer with elevated administrator privileges, and confirmed successful installation and application launch.

issue_description: Distribution group not delivering messages to all recipients
root_cause: The distribution list had reached its member delivery restriction setting, which was limited to internal senders only, blocking messages from an external partner.
resolution: Reviewed the distribution list delivery management settings in the Exchange admin center, updated the setting to allow senders from approved external domains, and confirmed test email delivery to all members.

issue_description: User requesting installation of Adobe Acrobat Pro for contract work
root_cause: Standard software request requiring procurement validation, license assignment, and installation per the approved software catalog.
resolution: Verified the software request against the approved catalog and manager approval, assigned an available license, deployed the software via the software distribution tool, and confirmed successful installation and functionality.

issue_description: No pop-up alerts for new Teams messages
root_cause: Windows Focus Assist settings combined with disabled notification permissions for Teams in Windows Settings were suppressing notification banners.
resolution: Checked Windows notification settings and enabled notifications for Microsoft Teams, disabled Focus Assist during work hours, verified notification settings within the Teams app itself, and confirmed alerts were now appearing.

issue_description: User unable to install Office due to missing license
root_cause: The new user's Office 365 license assignment was missed during the onboarding provisioning process.
resolution: Assigned the appropriate Office 365 license in the Microsoft 365 admin center, waited for license propagation, and confirmed the user could install and activate Office applications.

issue_description: New role requires access to applications the user does not currently have
root_cause: Standard access request requiring removal of previous role-based permissions and provisioning of new role-appropriate application access.
resolution: Validated the access request against manager approval and the role-based access control matrix, removed outdated permissions from the previous role, provisioned access to the new required applications, and confirmed the user could access all needed systems.

issue_description: Distribution group not delivering messages to all recipients
root_cause: The distribution list had reached its member delivery restriction setting, which was limited to internal senders only, blocking messages from an external partner.
resolution: Reviewed the distribution list delivery management settings in the Exchange admin center, updated the setting to allow senders from approved external domains, and confirmed test email delivery to all members.

issue_description: User forgot their domain password and cannot log in
root_cause: The user had forgotten their password after an extended period away from the office and their self-service reset portal enrollment had expired.
resolution: Verified the user's identity per security policy, performed a manual password reset in Active Directory, set the account to require a password change at next logon, and guided the user through re-enrollment in self-service password reset.

issue_description: Outlook is very slow and freezes frequently when opening emails
root_cause: An oversized OST file combined with too many add-ins enabled was degrading Outlook's performance.
resolution: Disabled unnecessary add-ins, ran the Microsoft Support and Recovery Assistant to optimize and compact the OST file, enabled cached Exchange mode with a reduced sync window, and confirmed improved performance.

issue_description: WiFi speeds are extremely slow in the conference room
root_cause: Access point congestion due to a high density of connected devices in one area was exceeding the recommended client capacity per access point.
resolution: Analyzed access point client load using the wireless controller dashboard, deployed an additional access point to balance the load, enabled band steering to push capable devices to the less congested 5GHz band, and confirmed improved speeds.

issue_description: Application showing inconsistent data, possible database corruption
root_cause: An unexpected application crash during a batch write operation left the affected table in an inconsistent state.
resolution: Restored the affected table from the most recent verified backup, replayed transaction logs to minimize data loss, validated data integrity with the business team, and identified the root application bug for a permanent fix.

issue_description: Impossible travel alert flagged on user's account
root_cause: The user had traveled internationally and signed in from a new location without prior notice, triggering the conditional access risk policy.
resolution: Contacted the user to verify the login was legitimate, confirmed travel details, cleared the risk flag in Azure AD Identity Protection, and reminded the user to enable travel notifications for future trips.

issue_description: Office applications showing 'unlicensed product' error
root_cause: A token refresh failure between the local Office installation and the Azure AD authentication service caused the activation status to lapse.
resolution: Signed the user out of all Office applications, cleared cached credentials using Credential Manager, signed back in with corporate credentials, and confirmed Office reactivated successfully.

issue_description: User changes not reflecting consistently across sites
root_cause: A network connectivity issue between sites was preventing Active Directory replication traffic from completing, leading to inconsistent directory data.
resolution: Diagnosed replication failures using repadmin /showrepl, identified and resolved the underlying network connectivity issue between sites, forced manual replication, and confirmed all domain controllers were synchronized.

issue_description: Laptop showing blue screen of death repeatedly
root_cause: A faulty RAM module was causing memory corruption errors leading to repeated blue screen crashes.
resolution: Ran the Windows Memory Diagnostic tool which confirmed RAM errors, replaced the faulty memory module, ran extended diagnostics to confirm stability, and monitored the device for 24 hours with no further crashes.

issue_description: Network speeds significantly slower than normal across the office
root_cause: A broadcast storm caused by a misconfigured switch loop was consuming excessive bandwidth across the network segment.
resolution: Identified the loop using switch port monitoring, disabled the offending port, enabled spanning tree protocol on the affected switches to prevent future loops, and confirmed network speeds returned to normal.

issue_description: User cannot approve MFA prompts on their new device
root_cause: The user's MFA authentication method was tied to a mobile device that was no longer in their possession, blocking the second authentication factor.
resolution: Verified the user's identity through alternate means per security policy, removed the old MFA device registration in Azure AD, guided the user through re-registering MFA on their new device, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: Guest WiFi login page fails to load for new visitors
root_cause: The guest network's captive portal certificate had expired, preventing the login page from loading securely on visitor devices.
resolution: Renewed the expired SSL certificate for the captive portal, updated the certificate on the wireless controller, tested the guest login flow from a visitor device, and confirmed successful internet access.

issue_description: Office installation rolls back partway through setup
root_cause: A corrupted previous installation of Office on the device was conflicting with the new installation attempt.
resolution: Ran the Microsoft Support and Recovery Assistant to fully remove remnants of the previous Office installation, downloaded a fresh installer from the Microsoft 365 portal, and confirmed successful installation and activation.

resolution: Updated the SMTP authentication credentials in the printer's web configuration panel, tested the scan-to-email function with a sample document, and confirmed successful delivery.

resolution: Updated USB controller drivers, disabled USB selective suspend in power management settings, reconnected peripherals to different USB ports, and confirmed consistent responsiveness.

issue_description: User unable to receive emails due to full mailbox warning
root_cause: The user's mailbox had exceeded its assigned storage quota due to large attachments accumulated over time without archiving.
resolution: Archived older emails with large attachments to a local PST file, emptied the deleted items and junk folders, requested a temporary quota increase in Exchange Online, and confirmed mail flow resumed normally.

issue_description: Intermittent WiFi connectivity issues reported by multiple users
root_cause: Wireless access point overlap with conflicting channel settings was causing interference and forcing frequent reconnections.
resolution: Performed a wireless site survey to identify channel overlap, reconfigured access points to use non-overlapping channels, adjusted transmit power levels, and confirmed stable connectivity over a 24-hour monitoring period.

issue_description: Search function broken in Outlook desktop client
root_cause: The Windows Search index for Outlook had become corrupted, preventing the search function from returning accurate results.
resolution: Rebuilt the Outlook search index via Indexing Options in Control Panel, verified Outlook was included in the indexed locations, allowed the index to rebuild fully, and confirmed search returned correct results.

issue_description: Tool prompting for license renewal and blocking use
root_cause: The software license had expired and had not been renewed in the license management portal before the renewal deadline.
resolution: Confirmed license expiration with the software vendor's portal, processed an emergency license renewal with procurement, applied the new license key to the application, and confirmed restored functionality.

issue_description: Team distribution list appears broken, no one is getting emails

resolution: Reviewed the distribution list delivery management settings in the Exchange admin center, updated the setting to allow senders from approved external domains, and confirmed test email delivery to all members.

issue_description: New employee starting Monday needs an Active Directory account created
root_cause: Standard onboarding request requiring creation of a new Active Directory user account with appropriate group memberships and permissions.
resolution: Created the new Active Directory account using the standard naming convention, added the user to appropriate security and distribution groups based on department and role, set up home directory permissions, and notified the hiring manager of completion.

issue_description: Laptop screen stays black even when plugged in
root_cause: A faulty power adapter was failing to charge the battery, and the battery had fully depleted.
resolution: Tested with a known-good power adapter and confirmed the original adapter was faulty, replaced the power adapter, allowed the laptop to charge, and verified it powered on and booted successfully.

issue_description: Laptop showing blue screen of death repeatedly

resolution: Cleared cached VPN credentials from Windows Credential Manager, prompted the user to re-enter the new password, restarted the VPN client service, and verified successful tunnel establishment and connectivity to internal resources.

resolution: Documented the URL mapping between old and new site structures, set up redirects where possible, communicated the new links to affected users, and updated bookmarks in commonly used reference documents.

resolution: Uninstalled the incompatible generic driver, downloaded and installed the manufacturer-certified driver version, reconfigured the default printer settings, and verified successful printing.

resolution: Assigned the appropriate Office 365 license in the Microsoft 365 admin center, waited for license propagation, and confirmed the user could install and activate Office applications.

root_cause: The local OST cache file had become corrupted, preventing synchronization between the Outlook client and the Exchange Online mailbox.
resolution: Closed Outlook, deleted the corrupted OST file from the local profile cache, reopened Outlook to trigger a fresh download of mailbox data, and confirmed new emails were syncing correctly.

issue_description: Antivirus software detected malware on user's laptop
root_cause: The user had downloaded an infected file from an untrusted website that bypassed initial email filtering.
resolution: Isolated the affected device from the network immediately, ran a full antivirus scan and removed the identified malware, verified no lateral spread occurred via network logs, and re-imaged the device as a precaution before returning it to service.

issue_description: Shared document links returning 404 errors post-migration
root_cause: The site migration changed the underlying site URL structure, invalidating previously shared and bookmarked links.
resolution: Documented the URL mapping between old and new site structures, set up redirects where possible, communicated the new links to affected users, and updated bookmarks in commonly used reference documents.

issue_description: External sender's emails to our distribution list are bouncing
root_cause: The distribution list had reached its member delivery restriction setting, which was limited to internal senders only, blocking messages from an external partner.
resolution: Reviewed the distribution list delivery management settings in the Exchange admin center, updated the setting to allow senders from approved external domains, and confirmed test email delivery to all members.

issue_description: Employee flagged an email asking for credentials as suspicious
root_cause: A phishing email impersonating a known vendor was sent to multiple users, attempting to harvest credentials through a fake login page.
resolution: Confirmed the email was malicious through header analysis, blocked the sender domain at the email gateway, purged the message from all affected mailboxes using Microsoft Purview, and notified affected users with security awareness guidance.

issue_description: User missing Teams alerts despite having notifications enabled
root_cause: Windows Focus Assist settings combined with disabled notification permissions for Teams in Windows Settings were suppressing notification banners.
resolution: Checked Windows notification settings and enabled notifications for Microsoft Teams, disabled Focus Assist during work hours, verified notification settings within the Teams app itself, and confirmed alerts were now appearing.

issue_description: Multi-factor authentication broken after device replacement
root_cause: The user's MFA authentication method was tied to a mobile device that was no longer in their possession, blocking the second authentication factor.
resolution: Verified the user's identity through alternate means per security policy, removed the old MFA device registration in Azure AD, guided the user through re-registering MFA on their new device, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: Cisco AnyConnect closes unexpectedly when opening
root_cause: Corrupted VPN client installation files combined with an outdated network adapter driver caused the application to crash on launch.
resolution: Uninstalled the VPN client completely, removed leftover configuration folders, updated the network adapter driver to the latest version, reinstalled the VPN client from the approved software repository, and confirmed stable connection without crashes.

issue_description: Search function broken in Outlook desktop client
root_cause: The Windows Search index for Outlook had become corrupted, preventing the search function from returning accurate results.
resolution: Rebuilt the Outlook search index via Indexing Options in Control Panel, verified Outlook was included in the indexed locations, allowed the index to rebuild fully, and confirmed search returned correct results.

issue_description: Desktop monitor shows no signal even though PC is running
root_cause: A loose display cable connection at the graphics card was preventing the video signal from reaching the monitor.
resolution: Reseated the display cable at both the monitor and graphics card ends, tested with an alternate cable to rule out a faulty cable, and confirmed video output was restored.

issue_description: Monitors stay blank after connecting laptop to dock
root_cause: Outdated docking station firmware and a USB-C driver conflict were preventing proper device detection.
resolution: Updated the docking station firmware to the latest version, updated USB-C and display drivers on the laptop, reseated all cable connections, and confirmed external monitors and peripherals were detected correctly.

issue_description: Password changed on-premises but old password still required for Office 365
root_cause: Azure AD Connect synchronization had failed for the user's account due to a sync engine error, preventing the new password hash from propagating to the cloud.
resolution: Checked the Azure AD Connect sync logs and identified the failed sync attempt, manually triggered a directory synchronization (delta sync), confirmed the password hash synced successfully, and verified the user could log into Office 365.

issue_description: Network connectivity unstable at a single desk
root_cause: A faulty network patch cable combined with a misconfigured switch port duplex setting caused intermittent packet loss and disconnects.
resolution: Replaced the faulty patch cable, reset the switch port to auto-negotiate duplex and speed settings, and monitored the connection for 30 minutes to confirm stability.

issue_description: Workstation powers off unexpectedly during use
root_cause: Dust buildup in the CPU heatsink and case fans was restricting airflow, causing the system to overheat and trigger automatic shutdown protection.
resolution: Opened the desktop case, cleaned out accumulated dust from the heatsink and fans using compressed air, reapplied thermal paste to the CPU, and monitored temperatures under load to confirm the issue was resolved.

issue_description: Application setup wizard crashes during installation
root_cause: Insufficient permissions on the local machine and a conflicting older version of the software were preventing successful installation.
resolution: Uninstalled the conflicting older version completely using the manufacturer's removal tool, ran the installer with elevated administrator privileges, and confirmed successful installation and application launch.

issue_description: Unable to scan documents and send to email from the printer
root_cause: The SMTP relay credentials stored on the multifunction printer had expired after a scheduled password rotation.
resolution: Updated the SMTP authentication credentials in the printer's web configuration panel, tested the scan-to-email function with a sample document, and confirmed successful delivery.

issue_description: Application performance degraded due to slow database response
root_cause: Outdated database statistics and fragmented indexes were causing the query optimizer to generate inefficient execution plans.
resolution: Rebuilt fragmented indexes on the affected tables, updated database statistics, reviewed and optimized the slowest query's execution plan, and confirmed query performance returned to baseline.

issue_description: VPN application will not stay open long enough to connect
root_cause: Corrupted VPN client installation files combined with an outdated network adapter driver caused the application to crash on launch.
resolution: Uninstalled the VPN client completely, removed leftover configuration folders, updated the network adapter driver to the latest version, reinstalled the VPN client from the approved software repository, and confirmed stable connection without crashes.

issue_description: VPN client crashes immediately after launch on Windows 11 laptop
root_cause: Corrupted VPN client installation files combined with an outdated network adapter driver caused the application to crash on launch.
resolution: Uninstalled the VPN client completely, removed leftover configuration folders, updated the network adapter driver to the latest version, reinstalled the VPN client from the approved software repository, and confirmed stable connection without crashes.

issue_description: Office license appears unassigned for new starter
root_cause: The new user's Office 365 license assignment was missed during the onboarding provisioning process.
resolution: Assigned the appropriate Office 365 license in the Microsoft 365 admin center, waited for license propagation, and confirmed the user could install and activate Office applications.

issue_description: User cannot approve MFA prompts on their new device
root_cause: The user's MFA authentication method was tied to a mobile device that was no longer in their possession, blocking the second authentication factor.
resolution: Verified the user's identity through alternate means per security policy, removed the old MFA device registration in Azure AD, guided the user through re-registering MFA on their new device, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: OneDrive sync stopped due to exceeding storage quota
root_cause: The user's OneDrive storage usage had grown beyond the standard allocation due to large video files stored without cleanup.
resolution: Reviewed storage usage in OneDrive admin reports, worked with the user to archive or delete unnecessary large files, requested a temporary storage quota increase for the business justification, and confirmed sync resumed.

issue_description: Application stops responding right after opening Outlook
root_cause: A corrupted Outlook profile and a damaged add-in were causing the application to crash during initialization.
resolution: Started Outlook in safe mode to confirm an add-in conflict, disabled the problematic COM add-in, rebuilt the Outlook profile from Control Panel, and verified Outlook opened and synced normally.

issue_description: Cloud password out of sync with on-prem Active Directory
root_cause: Azure AD Connect synchronization had failed for the user's account due to a sync engine error, preventing the new password hash from propagating to the cloud.
resolution: Checked the Azure AD Connect sync logs and identified the failed sync attempt, manually triggered a directory synchronization (delta sync), confirmed the password hash synced successfully, and verified the user could log into Office 365.

issue_description: Laptop won't hold a charge for more than 30 minutes
root_cause: The laptop battery had reached the end of its usable lifecycle after several years of charge cycles, reducing its capacity significantly.
resolution: Ran a battery health diagnostic confirming significantly degraded capacity, ordered and installed a replacement battery from approved vendor stock, and verified normal battery performance after replacement.

issue_description: Endpoint security console flagged an infected file
root_cause: The user had downloaded an infected file from an untrusted website that bypassed initial email filtering.
resolution: Isolated the affected device from the network immediately, ran a full antivirus scan and removed the identified malware, verified no lateral spread occurred via network logs, and re-imaged the device as a precaution before returning it to service.

issue_description: Employee promoted to new role needs access to additional applications
root_cause: Standard access request requiring removal of previous role-based permissions and provisioning of new role-appropriate application access.
resolution: Validated the access request against manager approval and the role-based access control matrix, removed outdated permissions from the previous role, provisioned access to the new required applications, and confirmed the user could access all needed systems.

issue_description: Laptop showing blue screen of death repeatedly
root_cause: A faulty RAM module was causing memory corruption errors leading to repeated blue screen crashes.
resolution: Ran the Windows Memory Diagnostic tool which confirmed RAM errors, replaced the faulty memory module, ran extended diagnostics to confirm stability, and monitored the device for 24 hours with no further crashes.

issue_description: Multi-factor authentication prompt missing during VPN login
root_cause: User's mobile device was not properly enrolled in the Duo MFA service after a recent phone replacement, preventing push notifications from being delivered.
resolution: Verified the user's identity, re-enrolled the new mobile device in the Duo MFA portal, sent a test push notification to confirm delivery, and validated successful VPN login with MFA.

issue_description: Employee flagged an email asking for credentials as suspicious
root_cause: A phishing email impersonating a known vendor was sent to multiple users, attempting to harvest credentials through a fake login page.
resolution: Confirmed the email was malicious through header analysis, blocked the sender domain at the email gateway, purged the message from all affected mailboxes using Microsoft Purview, and notified affected users with security awareness guidance.

issue_description: Links to SharePoint documents broken after site migration
root_cause: The site migration changed the underlying site URL structure, invalidating previously shared and bookmarked links.
resolution: Documented the URL mapping between old and new site structures, set up redirects where possible, communicated the new links to affected users, and updated bookmarks in commonly used reference documents.

issue_description: Mailbox not syncing new messages in desktop Outlook client
root_cause: The local OST cache file had become corrupted, preventing synchronization between the Outlook client and the Exchange Online mailbox.
resolution: Closed Outlook, deleted the corrupted OST file from the local profile cache, reopened Outlook to trigger a fresh download of mailbox data, and confirmed new emails were syncing correctly.

issue_description: Application lags badly when switching between folders in Outlook
root_cause: An oversized OST file combined with too many add-ins enabled was degrading Outlook's performance.
resolution: Disabled unnecessary add-ins, ran the Microsoft Support and Recovery Assistant to optimize and compact the OST file, enabled cached Exchange mode with a reduced sync window, and confirmed improved performance.

issue_description: User cannot approve MFA prompts on their new device
root_cause: The user's MFA authentication method was tied to a mobile device that was no longer in their possession, blocking the second authentication factor.
resolution: Verified the user's identity through alternate means per security policy, removed the old MFA device registration in Azure AD, guided the user through re-registering MFA on their new device, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: Application freezes immediately after opening Teams
root_cause: A corrupted local Teams cache was preventing the application from initializing correctly.
resolution: Closed Teams completely from Task Manager, cleared the Teams cache folder from the local AppData directory, restarted the application, and confirmed Teams loaded and signed in successfully.

issue_description: Unable to add an external partner as a contact in Teams
root_cause: External access (federation) had not been enabled between the two organizations' tenants, preventing cross-tenant search and communication.
resolution: Verified external access settings in the Teams admin center, added the partner organization's domain to the allowed list, waited for the configuration to propagate, and confirmed successful contact search and messaging.

issue_description: DNS lookup failures reported across multiple workstations
root_cause: The primary internal DNS server service had stopped responding due to a memory leak, causing name resolution failures for clients pointed to it.
resolution: Restarted the DNS server service, cleared the DNS cache on affected client machines using ipconfig /flushdns, verified zone records were intact, and confirmed name resolution was working normally.

issue_description: User requires elevated application access following role change
root_cause: Standard access request requiring removal of previous role-based permissions and provisioning of new role-appropriate application access.
resolution: Validated the access request against manager approval and the role-based access control matrix, removed outdated permissions from the previous role, provisioned access to the new required applications, and confirmed the user could access all needed systems.

issue_description: Scanner shows SMTP authentication error
root_cause: The SMTP relay credentials stored on the multifunction printer had expired after a scheduled password rotation.
resolution: Updated the SMTP authentication credentials in the printer's web configuration panel, tested the scan-to-email function with a sample document, and confirmed successful delivery.

issue_description: Remote access fails after changing corporate password
root_cause: Stored VPN credentials became invalid after the user's domain password was updated, causing authentication failures against the RADIUS server.
resolution: Cleared cached VPN credentials from Windows Credential Manager, prompted the user to re-enter the new password, restarted the VPN client service, and verified successful tunnel establishment and connectivity to internal resources.

issue_description: Office 365 apps require reactivation, showing red banner
root_cause: A token refresh failure between the local Office installation and the Azure AD authentication service caused the activation status to lapse.
resolution: Signed the user out of all Office applications, cleared cached credentials using Credential Manager, signed back in with corporate credentials, and confirmed Office reactivated successfully.

issue_description: VPN connection profile disappeared following OS reinstall
root_cause: The VPN configuration profile was not included in the standard imaging process, so the freshly imaged device had no preconfigured connection.
resolution: Pushed the corporate VPN configuration profile via the software deployment tool, manually verified profile settings including gateway address and authentication method, and tested a successful connection.

resolution: Ran the Microsoft Support and Recovery Assistant to fully remove remnants of the previous Office installation, downloaded a fresh installer from the Microsoft 365 portal, and confirmed successful installation and activation.

resolution: Created the new Active Directory account using the standard naming convention, added the user to appropriate security and distribution groups based on department and role, set up home directory permissions, and notified the hiring manager of completion.

resolution: Updated USB controller drivers, disabled USB selective suspend in power management settings, reconnected peripherals to different USB ports, and confirmed consistent responsiveness.

issue_description: User locked out after too many incorrect password guesses
root_cause: The user had forgotten their password after an extended period away from the office and their self-service reset portal enrollment had expired.
resolution: Verified the user's identity per security policy, performed a manual password reset in Active Directory, set the account to require a password change at next logon, and guided the user through re-enrollment in self-service password reset.

issue_description: Print driver error appearing since latest patch installed
root_cause: The recent Windows update overwrote the existing printer driver with an incompatible generic driver.
resolution: Uninstalled the incompatible generic driver, downloaded and installed the manufacturer-certified driver version, reconfigured the default printer settings, and verified successful printing.

issue_description: Software stopped working, says trial period has ended
root_cause: The software license had expired and had not been renewed in the license management portal before the renewal deadline.
resolution: Confirmed license expiration with the software vendor's portal, processed an emergency license renewal with procurement, applied the new license key to the application, and confirmed restored functionality.

issue_description: Cloud password out of sync with on-prem Active Directory
root_cause: Azure AD Connect synchronization had failed for the user's account due to a sync engine error, preventing the new password hash from propagating to the cloud.
resolution: Checked the Azure AD Connect sync logs and identified the failed sync attempt, manually triggered a directory synchronization (delta sync), confirmed the password hash synced successfully, and verified the user could log into Office 365.

issue_description: Ethernet connection keeps dropping every few minutes
root_cause: A faulty network patch cable combined with a misconfigured switch port duplex setting caused intermittent packet loss and disconnects.
resolution: Replaced the faulty patch cable, reset the switch port to auto-negotiate duplex and speed settings, and monitored the connection for 30 minutes to confirm stability.

issue_description: Password reset link sent via email is not working
root_cause: The new password entered did not meet updated complexity requirements, but the self-service reset portal returned a generic error instead of specifying the requirement.
resolution: Clarified the updated password complexity requirements to the user, assisted them in creating a compliant password through the self-service portal, and confirmed successful reset and login.

issue_description: Laptop reboots unexpectedly with a blue error screen
root_cause: A faulty RAM module was causing memory corruption errors leading to repeated blue screen crashes.
resolution: Ran the Windows Memory Diagnostic tool which confirmed RAM errors, replaced the faulty memory module, ran extended diagnostics to confirm stability, and monitored the device for 24 hours with no further crashes.

issue_description: Inconsistent login behavior across office locations due to AD replication issues
root_cause: A network connectivity issue between sites was preventing Active Directory replication traffic from completing, leading to inconsistent directory data.
resolution: Diagnosed replication failures using repadmin /showrepl, identified and resolved the underlying network connectivity issue between sites, forced manual replication, and confirmed all domain controllers were synchronized.

issue_description: Shared mailbox no longer appears in user's Outlook
root_cause: The user's permission on the shared mailbox had been inadvertently removed during a recent Active Directory group cleanup.
resolution: Re-added the user's permissions to the shared mailbox in the Exchange Online admin center, had the user remove and re-add the shared mailbox in Outlook, and confirmed it appeared with full access.

issue_description: SharePoint team site takes a long time to load pages
root_cause: An oversized document library with over 100,000 items without proper indexing was causing slow query performance.
resolution: Reviewed the document library structure, created additional indexed columns for frequently filtered fields, reorganized content into multiple libraries to reduce item count per view, and confirmed improved load times.

issue_description: Login failure on internal HR portal despite correct password
root_cause: The user's account had not been properly provisioned in the application's identity provider following a recent SSO migration.
resolution: Verified the user's account status in the application's admin console, manually provisioned the account through the SSO identity provider, synchronized the user attributes, and confirmed successful login.

issue_description: Files not syncing to OneDrive, stuck in 'processing changes'
root_cause: A file path exceeding the maximum character limit was causing the OneDrive sync client to fail on specific files.
resolution: Identified the files with excessively long file paths using the OneDrive sync diagnostic tool, renamed and relocated the affected files to shorten the path, reset the OneDrive sync client, and confirmed successful synchronization.

issue_description: Duplicate files created after editing a shared document
root_cause: Two users editing the same file simultaneously while offline caused conflicting versions to be created upon reconnection.
resolution: Identified the conflicting file versions, worked with both users to merge changes manually, removed the duplicate conflict file, and educated users on co-authoring best practices to avoid future conflicts.

issue_description: Wireless connection rejected with authentication error
root_cause: The wireless network profile on the device had a mismatched or expired certificate required for WPA2-Enterprise authentication.
resolution: Removed the existing WiFi profile from the device, reinstalled the required network authentication certificate, reconnected to the corporate SSID with updated credentials, and confirmed stable connectivity.

issue_description: Cannot map to shared network printer from workstation
root_cause: The printer's IP address had changed after a DHCP lease renewal, and the client's printer configuration still pointed to the old address.
resolution: Identified the new printer IP address via the print server console, removed the old printer connection on the client machine, reinstalled the printer using the updated IP address, and confirmed a successful test print.

issue_description: Database queries running significantly slower than usual
root_cause: Outdated database statistics and fragmented indexes were causing the query optimizer to generate inefficient execution plans.
resolution: Rebuilt fragmented indexes on the affected tables, updated database statistics, reviewed and optimized the slowest query's execution plan, and confirmed query performance returned to baseline.

issue_description: Intermittent WiFi connectivity issues reported by multiple users
root_cause: Wireless access point overlap with conflicting channel settings was causing interference and forcing frequent reconnections.
resolution: Performed a wireless site survey to identify channel overlap, reconfigured access points to use non-overlapping channels, adjusted transmit power levels, and confirmed stable connectivity over a 24-hour monitoring period.

issue_description: Duplicate files created after editing a shared document
root_cause: Two users editing the same file simultaneously while offline caused conflicting versions to be created upon reconnection.
resolution: Identified the conflicting file versions, worked with both users to merge changes manually, removed the duplicate conflict file, and educated users on co-authoring best practices to avoid future conflicts.

issue_description: Outgoing company emails being marked as suspicious by clients
root_cause: The domain's SPF and DKIM records were misconfigured, causing recipient mail servers to flag outgoing messages as potential spam.
resolution: Reviewed and corrected the SPF record to include all authorized sending IPs, verified DKIM signing was properly configured, and confirmed improved deliverability using a mail tester tool.

issue_description: Users lost access to printers after department was moved to new OU
root_cause: Group Policy Objects linked to the previous organizational unit were not linked to the new OU, causing loss of policy-based resource access.
resolution: Reviewed GPO links in Group Policy Management Console, linked the appropriate policies to the new organizational unit, ran gpupdate /force on affected machines, and confirmed restored access.

issue_description: Outlook crashes immediately every time it is opened
root_cause: A corrupted Outlook profile and a damaged add-in were causing the application to crash during initialization.
resolution: Started Outlook in safe mode to confirm an add-in conflict, disabled the problematic COM add-in, rebuilt the Outlook profile from Control Panel, and verified Outlook opened and synced normally.

issue_description: Login failure on internal HR portal despite correct password
root_cause: The user's account had not been properly provisioned in the application's identity provider following a recent SSO migration.

resolution: Checked Windows notification settings and enabled notifications for Microsoft Teams, disabled Focus Assist during work hours, verified notification settings within the Teams app itself, and confirmed alerts were now appearing.

issue_description: Other participants cannot see shared screen in Teams call
